Story quest chain

Counter attack!

Systems4
Targets14
Rewards14

Chain Overview

StartNo explicit starter body
Systemn/a
Parts28
First questCounter attack! - Part 1

Defeat 1 Nexar Commander lvl 110, Nexar Skirmisher lvl 85, Nexar Vanguard lvl 84 in Fulzar

Route & Targets

  • System: Fulzar
  • System: Arrenius
  • System: Zergilin
  • System: Vorsran
  • Location: AFIS HQ in Arrenius
  • Location: AF Research Station in Arrenius
  • Location: Abandoned Factory in Fulzar
  • Location: Xhargregs Research Station in Zergilin
  • Location: AF Security Gate in Fulzar
  • Location: Warp Gate in Vorsran
  • Location: Research Station in Vorsran
  • Location: Nexar Hangar in Vorsran
  • Location: Ahrgeris in Vorsran
  • Location: Nexar Recycle Station in Vorsran
  • Location: Zhersis in Vorsran
  • Targets: Nexar Commander lvl 110, Nexar Skirmisher lvl 85, Nexar Vanguard lvl 84, Nexar Stealth Bomber lvl 80, Nexar Cluster Bomber lvl 85, Nexar Projector lvl 90, Nexar Tank lvl 100, Nexar Fighter lvl 95, Nexar Elite Blade lvl 124, Nexar Elite Edge lvl 122, Nexar Elite Phaser lvl 120, Nexar Elite Shadow lvl 128, Nexar Elite Vindicator lvl 126
  • Items: Bug Leg

Part 1: Counter attack! - Part 1

CategoryStory
Typekill
Subtypeship
Level range0
RewardMission XP 5.6k Steel 2.4k

Defeat 1 Nexar Commander lvl 110, Nexar Skirmisher lvl 85, Nexar Vanguard lvl 84 in Fulzar

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Go to Fulzar.
  2. Defeat 1 Nexar Commander lvl 110, Nexar Skirmisher lvl 85, Nexar Vanguard lvl 84.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock Counter attack! - Part 2.

Description

Operative Smith: “After the last few weeks of battle we can tell it’s starting to take a toll on them. The strength of their onslaught has significantly weakened! It’s time to figure out who this new enemy is, so we can take the fight to them. First we need to identify their species. Try to find an enemy pilot… dead or alive!”

Completion

Operative Smith: “Excellent work… although the corpse is quite badly damaged it’s a good start. Bring the remains to the AFIS HQ station in Arrenius, perhaps they can reconstruct an image of what it used to look like… before you blew it up...”

Part 2: Counter attack! - Part 2

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP 5.6k Steel 2.4k

Travel / deliver to AFIS HQ

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to AFIS HQ.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock Counter attack! - Part 3.

Description

Operative Smith: “Bring the remains to the AFIS HQ station in Arrenius, perhaps they can reconstruct an image of what it used to look like… before you blew it up.”

Completion

AF Agent: “What have you got for us this time? Really???? You want me to do what?? Sigh.. I wonder why I signed up for this line of work.

Okok… I’ll get to work.. To complete this task I’ll need some supplies from the AF Research Station here in Arrenius.“

Part 3: Counter attack! - Part 3

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP 1600-1800

Travel / deliver to AF Research Station

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to AF Research Station.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock Counter attack! - Part 4.

Description

To complete the task of reconstructing the corpse the AF Agent requires some supplies from the AF Research Station here in Arrenius.

Completion

Lieutenant Keryn: “Hi there hero! Long time no see. What’s Fulzar like?

A supply request? Sure I’ll get the supplies you requested right away!”

Part 4: Counter attack! - Part 4

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP 5.6k Steel 2.4k

Travel / deliver to AFIS HQ

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to AFIS HQ.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock Counter attack! - Part 5.

Description

Goto AFIS HQ in Arrenius

Completion

AF Agent: “That was fast.. sigh.. I guess I have to get on with reconstructing the corpse then…”

Several hours later

AF Agent: “This is the best I can do… Oh? You think recognize this species? I didn’t expect that. Who is this Xhargreg you speak of?”

Go search for Xhargreg at the Abandoned Factory in Fulzar

Part 5: Counter attack! - Part 5

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP16k F8

Travel / deliver to Abandoned Factory

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to Abandoned Factory.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock Counter attack! - Part 6.

Description

You recognized that special kind of alien species very well, you have definitely encountered one before.

You feel you better go talk to Xhargreg, right away.

Xhargreg was last seen at the Abandoned Factory in Fulzar

Completion

Giant Mutated Wasp: “Bzzzzz!”

Crew: “Eeeek! Not again! Please, Captain let’s go somewhere else?”

Giant Mutated Wasp: *sad bzzz*

Part 6: Counter attack! - Part 6

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP 16800

Travel / deliver to Xhargregs Research Station

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to Xhargregs Research Station.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock Counter attack! - Part 7.

Description

Go search for Xhargreg at his research station in Zergelin.

Completion

Xhargreg: ”Why hello there! Who might you be? Never mind... there are more important issues at hand… hmmm wait a minute... do bugs have hands? I meant there are more important issues at *BUG LEGS*! HAHAhahehhehaaha... *coughing*.. haHAehhehaaha.. ehgh.. why are you still here?”

*Xhargreg shuts the door*

You can only think of one way to get Xhargreg attention… guess it’s back to Hozar again.

Part 7: Counter attack! - Part 7

CategoryStory
Typepickup
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP 1000-1200

Collect 88 Bug Leg

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Collect 88 Bug Leg.
  2. Turn in the quest to unlock Counter attack! - Part 8.

Description

Gather 88 Bug Legs.

Completion

Bring the Bug Legs to Xhargreg in Zergelin.

Part 8: Counter attack! - Part 8

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP26k F16

Travel / deliver to Xhargregs Research Station

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to Xhargregs Research Station.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock Counter attack! - Part 9.

Description

Bring the Bug Legs to Xhargreg in Zergelin.

Completion

Xhargreg: ”Why hello there! Look at all those Bug Leg! That’s the best gift anyone could ever wish for!!! Oh? You want my help? .. wait.. what have you got there? Eeep! Oh.. phew… it’s dead…

It’s been a long long time since I saw another one of my species.. although not long enough.. hahahharghga....”

*Xhargreg pokes the corpse with a bug leg*

Xhargreg: ”You say they have appeared in Fulzar? That’s terrible news! *Sob* All our poor bug friends are in danger now! I must check on my poor wasp!

*Xhargreg rushes off*

Report back to Operative Smith in Fulzar.

Part 9: Counter attack! - Part 9

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP 5.6k Steel 2.4k

Travel / deliver to AF Security Gate

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to AF Security Gate.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock Counter attack! - Part 10.

Description

Report back to Operative Smith in Fulzar.

Completion

Operative Smith: “This was unexpected news... and potentially very useful… Since you already know someone of this species… you will have to follow this up. Your new mission is to find out more about this new species from your contact Xhargreg. What’s this species called? Where do they attack from? What are their weaknesses?”

Part 10: Counter attack! - Part 10

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP 16800

Travel / deliver to Abandoned Factory

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to Abandoned Factory.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock Counter attack! - Part 11.

Description

Go to Xhargreg at the Abandoned Factory in Fulzar.

Completion

Giant Mutated Wasp: “Bzzzzz!”

Xhargreg: “Bzzzzz! bzzz?”

Giant Mutated Wasp: “Bzzzzz bzzz.”

Crew: “What’s going on???”

Xhargreg: “Great news everybody! All our wasp friends are safe!”

*Two hours later*

Xhargreg: “Oh, you want to know more about my species? Okok… they are called the Nexar… they live in Vorsran now… bla bla… they don’t like bugs… blabla.. they can travel through black holes… ***BORING!!!***

Let’s change the subject to something a little more interesting… like ANTS!

Hmmm.. got any advice on how to get ants?”

Part 11: Counter attack! - Part 11

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP8600 DC250

Travel / deliver to AF Security Gate

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to AF Security Gate.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock Counter attack! - Part 12.

Description

Report back to Operative Smith at the Warp Gate in Fulzar.

Completion

Operative Smith: “Ok, not much information, but it’s something at least. Our first step should be to enter Vorsran. There should be an old inoperative Warp Gate there… it can be reactivated from this side, how ever that will be very expensive. We can assist with some of the required data chips.”

Part 12: Counter attack! - Part 12

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP 16800

Travel / deliver to Warp Gate

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to Warp Gate.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock Counter attack! - Part 13.

Description

Find your way into Vorsran.

Completion

Operative Smith: “Excellent finally some progress! But… look at that thing they have constructed in here… their defences are truly impressive. Breaking through their defences is not going to be easy. Contact Admiral McArthur, at the Research Station here in Vorsran.”

Part 13: Counter attack! - Part 13

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP 16800

Travel / deliver to Research Station

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to Research Station.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock Counter attack! - Part 14.

Description

Contact Admiral McArthur, at the Research Station here in Vorsran.

Completion

Admiral McArthur: “Greetings Captain, I have heard a lot about you from Admiral Ymer. It’s a pleasure to finally meet you in person. It’s time to get to work. We have to do something about those bombers, it’s going to be extremely difficult to keep our foothold here with those bombers operating freely. Our defence forces are helpless due to the enemy's stealth technology.”

Part 14: Counter attack! - Part 14

CategoryStory
Typekill
Subtypeship
Level range0
RewardMission XP26k F16

Defeat 75 Nexar Stealth Bomber lvl 80 in Vorsran

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Go to Vorsran.
  2. Defeat 75 Nexar Stealth Bomber lvl 80.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock Counter attack! - Part 15.

Description

Destroy 75 Nexar Stealth Bombers in Vorsran.

Completion

Admiral McArthur: “Hmm…. that took longer than I expected… Maybe your reputation was a bit exaggerated? Anyway.. we got a lot of work to do here.

The key to victory in any war is knowledge about the opponent. How do they operate? What are their strong points? Weak points? Habits? Engage a couple of Skirmishers and Cluster bombers, and we’ll observe their behaviour from here.

Part 15: Counter attack! - Part 15

CategoryStory
Typekill
Subtypeship
Level range0
RewardMission XP16k F8

Defeat 20 Nexar Cluster Bomber lvl 85, Nexar Skirmisher lvl 85 in Vorsran

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Go to Vorsran.
  2. Defeat 20 Nexar Cluster Bomber lvl 85, Nexar Skirmisher lvl 85.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock Counter attack! - Part 16.

Description

Engage in battle with 20 Nexar Skirmishers or Nexar Cluster Bombers.

Completion

Admiral McArthur: “Interesting… they don’t show much teamwork. Next take out the an enemy strongholds. I expect you back within a few hours.”

Part 16: Counter attack! - Part 16

CategoryStory
Typekill
Subtypespawner
Level range0
RewardMission XP16k F8

Defeat 1 the required spawners in Vorsran

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Go to Vorsran.
  2. Defeat 1 the required spawners.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock Counter attack! - Part 17.

Description

Destroy a Nexar Strongholds in Vorsran.

Completion

Admiral McArthur: “Those things are much tougher than they look. I wonder how so many of those large ships fits in there? Perhaps they contain some kind of teleportation devices or maybe even void portals?”

Part 17: Counter attack! - Part 17

CategoryStory
Typekill
Subtypespawner
Level range0
RewardMission XP26k F16

Defeat 5 the required spawners in Vorsran

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Go to Vorsran.
  2. Defeat 5 the required spawners.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock Counter attack! - Part 18.

Description

Admiral McArthur: “Their defences does indeed look impressive. A five layered onion.. each layer protected by a force field barrier. Each force field does only have one entrance and it’s very heavily defended by bases sporting those nasty Heavy Weave Generators. Let’s try to break through the front gate. Start by taking out the 5 bases closes to the entrance.

Completion

Admiral McArthur: “That wasn’t too bad.. actually. Next it’s time to test the capability of the Nexar units stationed inside the first circle. Engage and take out 15 of them. The valid targets are Nexar Tank, Nexar Fighter and Nexar Projector.“

Part 18: Counter attack! - Part 18

CategoryStory
Typekill
Subtypeship
Level range0
RewardMission XP28k S5.8 A5x95

Defeat 15 Nexar Projector lvl 90, Nexar Tank lvl 100, Nexar Fighter lvl 95 in Vorsran

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Go to Vorsran.
  2. Defeat 15 Nexar Projector lvl 90, Nexar Tank lvl 100, Nexar Fighter lvl 95.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock Counter attack! - Part 19.

Description

Engage and destroy 15 Nexar Ships. The valid targets are the Nexar Tank, the Nexar Fighter and the Nexar Projector.

Completion

Admiral McArthur: “I have deviced a plan, AF have recently finished developing a mobile Safe Zone generator. Your first task is to take one and use it capture the Nexar Hangar in the first circle. The Safe Zone can be deployed after all the Nexar forces around the hangar have been defeated. The Safe Zone will go down if left unattended for more than 20 minutes, allowing the Nexar to recapture the hangar.”

Part 19: Counter attack! - Part 19

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP28k S5.8 A5x95

Travel / deliver to Nexar Hangar

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to Nexar Hangar.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock Counter attack! - Part 20.

Description

Assist in capturing the Nexar Hangar located in the first circle!

Completion

Admiral McArthur: “Excellent, this might give us access to Nexar technology!”

Part 20: Counter attack! - Part 20

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP26k F16

Travel / deliver to Ahrgeris

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to Ahrgeris.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock Counter attack! - Part 21.

Description

Admiral McArthur: “I got another mission for you in the meantime while our scientists investigates the Nexar Ships we found at the hangar. There is a planet located here in the first circle, make you way there and scan the surface.”

Completion

Admiral McArthur: “Bring the data to the AF Research station located next to the Vorsran Warp Gate. While you were busy our scientist discovered a lot of useful information about Nexar Space Crafts, apparently they don’t have any life support systems. This means that the Nexar can survive at 3K and in the vacuum of space. Quite scary news… There are some good new as well, our engineers have figured out a way to add life support systems to Nexar Fighters. The downside is that the space consumed by the life support system weakens the vessels combat potential.

Part 21: Counter attack! - Part 21

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP28k S3.6k A3x100

Travel / deliver to Research Station

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to Research Station.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock Counter attack! - Part 22.

Description

Bring the scan data to the AF Research station located next to the Vorsran Warp Gate.

Completion

AF Scientist: “Most interesting, the planet lacks an atmosphere and any breathable gasses… quite the harsh environment for living on. This probably means that the Nexar doesn’t use sound for communication. Perhaps this explains why they haven’t answered any of our communication attempts. Strange… I read your report about Xhargreg… seems like he was able to speak. Anyway back to the war… Admiral McArthur requested that you assist in capturing the Nexar Recycle station located in the 2nd ring.”

Part 22: Counter attack! - Part 22

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP32k F32

Travel / deliver to Nexar Recycle Station

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to Nexar Recycle Station.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock Counter attack! - Part 23.

Description

AF Scientist: “Most interesting, the planet lacks an atmosphere and any breathable gasses… quite the harsh environment for living on. This probably means that the Nexar doesn’t use sound for communication. Perhaps this explains why they haven’t answered any of our communication attempts. Strange… I read your report about Xhargreg… seems like he was able to speak. Anyway back to the war… Admiral McArthur requested that you assist in capturing the Nexar Recycle station located in the 2nd ring.”

Completion

Admiral McArthur: “Excellent, seems like your reputation didn’t actually exceed you. This war is starting to go very well for us now. However a new threat have been reported, a force called the Nexar Elite is defending the inner circles. Your next task is to find and defeat a member of the Nexar Elite.”

Part 23: Counter attack! - Part 23

CategoryStory
Typekill
Subtypeship
Level range0
RewardMission XP36k + f12 +a3x130

Defeat 1 Nexar Elite Blade lvl 124, Nexar Elite Edge lvl 122, Nexar Elite Phaser lvl 120, Nexar Elite Shadow lvl 128, Nexar Elite Vindicator lvl 126 in Vorsran

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Go to Vorsran.
  2. Defeat 1 Nexar Elite Blade lvl 124, Nexar Elite Edge lvl 122, Nexar Elite Phaser lvl 120, Nexar Elite Shadow lvl 128, Nexar Elite Vindicator lvl 126.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock Counter attack! - Part 24.

Description

Admiral McArthur: “A new threat have been reported, a force called the Nexar Elite is defending the inner circles. Your next task is to find and defeat a member of the Nexar Elite.”

Completion

Admiral McArthur: “Well done! That was a really nasty enemy. Defeating the Nexar Elite is not going to be an easy task. There might be another option avilable... I have received the report based on your scan data. Apparently the Nexar are unable to use sound for communication. Perhaps it’s time for a new attempt at negotiating. For this we will need the help of that madman Xhargreg… please try to convince him to help us.”

Part 24: Counter attack! - Part 24

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP 16800

Travel / deliver to Abandoned Factory

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to Abandoned Factory.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock Counter attack! - Part 25.

Description

Admiral McArthur: “I have received reports based on your scan data. Apparently the Nexar are unable to use sound for communication. Perhaps it’s time for a new attempt at negotiating. For this we will need the help of that madman Xhargreg… please try to convince him to help us. Find Xhargreg in Fulzar.”

Completion

Xhargreg: “Greetings traveller! Have you found any ants yet?”

*5 minutes later*

Xhargreg: “Pff more questions about those bloody Nexar? Perhaps… for a bug leg… or even better 42 Bug Legs!”

Part 25: Counter attack! - Part 25

CategoryStory
Typepickup
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP32k

Collect 42 Bug Leg

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Collect 42 Bug Leg.
  2. Turn in the quest to unlock Counter attack! - Part 26.

Description

Xhargreg agreed to help for the low low price of 42 Bug Legs… What's he doing with all the Bug Legs anyway?

Completion

Return to Xhargreg in Fulzar with the Bug Legs!

Part 26: Counter attack! - Part 26

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP 8400-8600

Travel / deliver to Abandoned Factory

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to Abandoned Factory.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock Counter attack! - Part 27.

Description

Return to Xhargreg in Fulzar with the Bug Legs!

Completion

Xhargreg: “Great, just in time… I was afraid I wouldn’t have enough Bug Legs for my next experiment… the glorious 42 foot wasp! Hehehahahhrhhehhghhg… finally... that must be *it*...”

*10 minutes later*

Xhargreg: “Why are you still here? Oh? Fine… yes nexar doesn’t breather any gas… and we can easily survive in space… I had to make the fake voice box to speak with your weird species… nexar uses chemicals signals for communications… You want me to do what... harghegghhfghd… fine……… I’ll come with you to do this… negotiation... thing...”

Part 27: Counter attack! - Part 27

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP54k + F26 A5x140

Travel / deliver to Zhersis

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to Zhersis.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock Counter attack! - Part 28.

Description

Land on Zhersis in Vorsran… and let Xhargreg attempt to negotiating with the Nexar… can this possibly end well?

Completion

Because of Xhargreg presence the Nexar didn’t open fire and you eventually managed to find a Nexar official of communicate with.

*After a few minutes of Xhargreg and the Nexar standing in front of each other doing nothing… visible… the Nexar official suddenly turns very angry… and pulls a gun..*

Xhargreg: “Now would be a good time to run! Hehehahahhehrhhg…”

*You easily manage to escape the planet*

Xhargreg: “Great news everyone! I successfully explained that AF intenteds to exterminate the Nexar as punishment for killing all those lovely bugs in Vorsran… Come see me once I have managed to set up a new research lab here in Vorsran… then we can continue with our plan!”

Crew: “Oh no… this can’t be good”

Part 28: Counter attack! - Part 28

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP 16800

Travel / deliver to Research Station

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to Research Station.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.

Description

Return with the news to Admiral McArthur at the Vorsran Research Station.

Completion

Admiral McArthur: ”That’s terrible news. I guess that ruined the chance of ever getting ending this war. Leave me... I need some time to think.“

Want to improve this wiki? Contributions are welcome on github.com/guedesite/astroflux-wiki.
